# services.cbatticon

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.cbatticon`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.cbatticon.batteryId` | `null or string` | ID of the battery to monitor. List with cbatticon -p . Defaults to the first entry in the list. |
| `services.cbatticon.commandCriticalLevel` | `null or strings concatenated with “\n”` | Command to execute when the critical battery level is reached. |
| `services.cbatticon.commandLeftClick` | `null or strings concatenated with “\n”` | Command to execute when left clicking on the tray icon. |
| `services.cbatticon.criticalLevelPercent` | `null or integer between 0 and 100 (both inclusive)` | Critical level percentage of the battery in percent (without the percent symbol). |
| `services.cbatticon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable cbatticon. |
| `services.cbatticon.hideNotification` | `null or boolean` | Hide the notification popups. |
| `services.cbatticon.iconType` | `null or one of “standard”, “notification”, “symbolic”` | Icon type to display in the system tray. |
| `services.cbatticon.lowLevelPercent` | `null or integer between 0 and 100 (both inclusive)` | Low level percentage of the battery in percent (without the percent symbol). |
| `services.cbatticon.package` | `package` | The cbatticon package to use. Use pkgs.batticonplus for wayland support. |
| `services.cbatticon.updateIntervalSeconds` | `null or (positive integer, meaning >0)` | Number of seconds between updates of the battery information. |
